+ "#HomeSLAM - Pruned %lu low-confidence clusters near high-confidence clusters"
+ "#HomeSLAM - Removing low-confidence cluster %d (dist %.2fm, dz %.2fm to high-confidence cluster %d)"
+ "#HomeSLAM LC Alignment Solver - SparseFactor(Cholesky) failed (status=%d)"
+ "#HomeSLAM LC Alignment Solver - SparseFactor(QR) failed (status=%d)"
+ "#HomeSLAM LC Alignment Solver - sgelss_ failed (info=%d)"
+ "#HomeSLAM LC Alignment Solver - unknown HomeSlamLoopClosureAlignmentSolverType setting value"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Multi-Floor Shape Matching - Generated %lu candidates from %lu floor transitions"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Multi-Floor Shape Matching - Got %d matches from %lu candidates"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Adaptive min displacement: %.2fm (setting=%.2f, p%.0f=%.2f)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Built euclidean distance matrix: %lu SI pairs from %lu aligned spans across %lu groups"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Fewer than 2 candidates, skipping"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Found %lu valid recurring sub-trajectory pairs out of %lu candidates"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Generated %lu recurring sub-trajectory candidates"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Produced %lu aligned spans across %lu groups"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - RF suitability: dropping entire cluster %lu, avg score %.3f > %.3f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - RF suitability: kept %lu / %lu members in cluster %lu"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - RF suitability: removing member %lu (seg %lu) score %.3f > %.3f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - Selected %lu clusters (%lu diverse) from %lu eligible (HC produced %lu total), min size %lu"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - alignment solver failed, skipping cluster %zu"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: abs(dz)=%.2f > %.2f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: contains floor transition"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: displacement=%.2f outside [%.2f, %.2f]"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: empty after trimming"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: failed to fit trimmed trajectory to grid"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: nothing left after trimming"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: originalPathLength=%.2f > %.2f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: standardization failed"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: too short for trimming (path=%.2f, trim=%.2f per edge)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: trimmedPathLength=%.2f < %.2f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: trimmedPathLength=%.2f > %.2f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Loop Closure - segment %lu rejected: z-span=%.2f > %.2f"
+ "#HomeSLAM Multi-Floor LC - Formed %lu groups (%.1f ms)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Multi-Floor LC - Found %lu matches from %lu candidates (%.1f ms)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Multi-Floor LC - Generated %lu candidates from %lu floor transitions (%.1f ms)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Multi-Floor LC - Produced %lu aligned spans across %lu groups (solve %.1f ms)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Multi-Floor LC - alignment solver failed for group of size %lu"
+ "#HomeSlam Mapper, applied SI limit: %zu static intervals, %zu segments remaining"
+ "#HomeSlam Mapper, generated %zu static intervals"
+ "#HomeSlam Mapper, segment skipped: trajectory %{private}s non-aligned distance %.2f m exceeds tolerance %.2f m between timestamps %.2f and %.2f"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, accumulated %zu bins"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, consolidation: %zu points (%.0f ms)"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, empty scoring grid"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, got %zu placements, %zu odometry, %zu segments, returning nil"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, no candidates selected"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, no trajectory points generated"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, pruned to %zu bins (from %zu)"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, reduced to %zu points (%.0f ms)"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, scoring grid: %zu bins (%.0f ms)"
+ "#HomeSlam ScoringWalkways, selected %zu candidates from %zu segments (%.0f ms)"
+ "#HomeSlam ULHomeSlamModel moved"
+ "#HomeSlam initState: isMultiFloorHome=%d"
+ "#HomeSlam initState: isMultiFloorHome=%d (floor transition detection %s)"
+ "#HomeSlam, Error in point cloud registration: %s"
+ "#HomeSlam, RFGroupPlacement minimizer terminated during linesearch, using best result found!"
+ "#HomeSlam, ULHomeSlamIOUpdateInputs::fromStatus received nil ioStatus"
+ "#HomeSlam, ULHomeSlamLocalizationPipeline::moveParticles - re-initializing particle north alignment angles from distribution"
+ "#HomeSlam, ULPointCloudRegistration minimizer runtime error: %s"
+ "#HomeSlam, ULPointCloudRegistration minimizer terminated during linesearch, using best result found!"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=%@] converged Off-Map due to RF update, newState=OffMap"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=%@] converged On-Map due to RF update, newState=Converged"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=%@] diverged due to RF update, newState=BeforeFirstFP"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=%@] localizing RF update"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=%@] lost convergence, newState=Converging"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=BeforeFirstFP] RF update caused divergence, newState=BeforeFirstFP"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=BeforeFirstFP] no ROI with RF distance below threshold (min=%.3f, thr=%.3f), staying in BeforeFirstFP"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=Converging] RF update caused divergence, newState=BeforeFirstFP"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=Converging] converged Off-Map due to RF update, newState=OffMap"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=Converging] converged On-Map due to RF update, newState=Converged"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidFingerprintUpdate, State=Converging] state unchanged, ioTransitionCompleted=%u, particleAreDenseAlongEnoughDistance=%u"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] converged Off-Map due to IO update, newState=OffMap"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] converged On-Map due to IO update, newState=Converged"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] diverged due to IO update, newState=BeforeFirstFP"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] localizing IO update"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] lost convergence, newState=Converging"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=%@] remained converged, newState=Converged"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=BeforeFirstFP] skipping IO update, awaiting first RF signal"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=Converging] converged Off-Map due to IO update, newState=OffMap"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=Converging] converged On-Map due to IO update, newState=Converged"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=Converging] diverged due to IO update, newState=BeforeFirstFP"

+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=Converging] localizing IO update"
+ "#HomeSlam, [ingestValidIOUpdate, State=Converging] state unchanged, ioTransitionCompleted=%u, particleAreDenseAlongEnoughDistance=%u"
+ "#HomeSlam, adaptive first query radius must be smaller than full radius"
+ "#HomeSlam, altitude status non-healthy (statusInfo=%{public}ld), clearing previousAltitude and skipping deltaZ accumulation"
+ "#HomeSlam, altitude update: deltaZ=%.3fm, cumulative=%.3fm"
+ "#HomeSlam, associateVMKPositionsToStaticIntervals: %zu co-location positions matched %zu static intervals"
+ "#HomeSlam, endpoint minimizer terminated during linesearch, using best result found!"
+ "#HomeSlam, fMaxDistFromTrajectories must be >= fOnMapMaxDistFromTrajectories"
+ "#HomeSlam, fSpatialCacheMaxElements should be non-negative"
+ "#HomeSlam, findConsensusDirections expects at least 2 points and an even count"
+ "#HomeSlam, interpolation spacing must be positive"
+ "#HomeSlam, isBlueDotClusterOnMap: no particles found in cluster"
+ "#HomeSlam, isBlueDotClusterOnMap: particles and particleInCluster size mismatch"
+ "#HomeSlam, localizer got io error! reason=IoError"
+ "#HomeSlam, onParticleDivergence: sigma %.3f + delta %.3f >= threshold %.3f, triggering reset"

+ "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after IO update! reason=TrajectoryLikelihoodZero"
+ "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after RF update! reason=RfLikelihoodZero"
+ "#HomeSlam, placeRFClusters built %zu VMK distance constraints"
+ "#HomeSlam, point cloud registration minimizer unkown exception!"
+ "#HomeSlam, reset instruction!"
+ "#HomeSlam, spatial cache cell size must be positive"
+ "#HomeSlam, ssyev_ failed to compute eigenvectors of nematic tensor (info=%d)"
+ "#HomeSlam, updateNorthAlignmentEstimate: first update nil, ignoring"
+ "#HomeSlam, updateNorthAlignmentEstimate: invalid dt=%.3fs (timestamp not advancing), nIOUpdates=%zu, lastTs=%.3f, newTs=%.3f"
+ "#HomeSlam, updateNorthAlignmentEstimate: n=%zu, mean=%.3f, sigma=%.3f, R=%.3f"
+ "#HomeSlam, updateNorthAlignmentEstimate: nil measurement, staleness only (sigma=%.3f)"
+ "#HomeSlam, updateNorthAlignmentEstimate: reset triggered by (sigma=%.3f >= threshold=%.3f), after reset: (sigma=%.3f >= mean=%.3f)"

+ "{}:SKIP"
- "!currentQueue || (currentQueue == queue)"
- "#16@0:8"
- "#HomeSlam Mapper, generated %zu static intervals with IO logic"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, found %zu FPs with geo clusters"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, found %zu geo clusters"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, got %zu clusteredPlacements, %zu odometryEntries, %zu segments, returning nil"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, got %zu point cloud points"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, got zero point cloud points"
- "#HomeSlam Walkways, reduced points to %zu point cloud points"
- "#HomeSlam, Initiating NorthAlignDist with (mean, sigma)=(%f, %f)"
- "#HomeSlam, Initiating NorthAlignDist with uniform dist"
- "#HomeSlam, RFGroupPlacement minimizer got linesearch error, using best result found!"
- "#HomeSlam, blue dot has low partical percentage and is off map, marking as diverged"
- "#HomeSlam, blue dot has low partical percentage on initial RF, diverging"
- "#HomeSlam, endpoint minimizer got linesearch error, using best result found!"
- "#HomeSlam, got unexpected window end index = 0 during northAlignOdometryMeasurements"
- "#HomeSlam, localizing IO update"
- "#HomeSlam, num fingerprint: %zu, num fingerprints in segments for RF clustering: %zu"
- "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after IO update!"
- "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after RF update!"
- "#HomeSlam, should only use one signal input at a time"
- "#HomeSlam, skipping IO update, awaiting first RF signal"
- "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Started CoreMotion PDR Fence session"
- "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Started Neural PDR Fence session"
- "#ULTimerFactory, Trying to create a timer on global queue without queue being set"
- "#ULTimerFactory, Trying to set a global queue while a different global queue is already set"
- "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - label localization failed - localizer failed to produce results"
- "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - label localized at (x,y,z)=(%f,%f,%f)"
- "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - scan event with photo features localization failed - localizer failed to produce results"
- "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - scan event with photo features localized at (x,y,z)=(%f,%f,%f)"
- "$defaultActor"
- "%@ cannot be initialized directly"
- "(%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,yaw:%.2f°)"
